name: Claris FileMaker OData API
description: The FileMaker OData API implements the Open Data Protocol (OData 4.01) standard for querying and updating data in FileMaker databases hosted by FileMaker Cloud and FileMaker Server. It provides a standard REST interface that works with OData-compatible clients like Excel, Power BI, and other tools. Supports JSON and Atom (XML) response formats.
